# Chapter 1: Failure as engineering subject  (~80 pp)
- 1.1 Why failure deserves a book (10) · 1.2 The taxonomy of failure (12) · 1.3 The Swiss-cheese model and its critics (12) · 1.4 The HRO and resilience-engineering traditions (12) · 1.5 Failure as data, not as shame (12) · 1.6 The reader's posture: how to study failure without becoming useless (12) · 1.7 Failure section: failures of failure analysis (10)

**Archetype**: failure, ethics. **Project**: pick any historical accident; read three primary sources; identify what each missed. **Exercises**: 20.
